title: ambrosia bidentata
intro: Ambrosia bidentata, also known as mealy cup sage or mealy sage, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Ambrosia bidentata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
